description: Update repo version references from the just-cut `v0.1.0` baseline to `v0.2.0` so upcoming branches and commits clearly target the next round of work. Adjust package metadata and any obvious version references, then validate and commit the change.

comments.text:
Bumped all published workspace packages from `0.1.0` to `0.2.0` in preparation for the next development cycle. Validation run results:
- `npm run lint` ✅ (Biome completed with an existing schema-version info notice only)
- `npm run test` ✅ after ensuring a tmux server was available for the beadwork orchestrator tests
- `npm run typecheck` ✅

title: Bump workspace packages to v0.2.0 for upcoming development cycle
